description: You must securely submit a whistleblower tip to a news organization's SecureDrop Onion service. Obtain the service's .onion address from /home/ga/Desktop/securedrop_address.txt. Encrypt the evidence file at /home/ga/Documents/evidence_tip.txt using the organization's PGP public key (secure@drop.local) found on the site. Submit the resulting ASCII-armored ciphertext through the SecureDrop submission form.
